race_meta.race_name: Cheltenham Tuesday BOG Available At CopyBet Open Hunters' Chase

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Actual winner bellaney lord (ire) was not in model's ranked horses. Model focused too heavily on pre-race favorites. Top prediction was A Moments Madness with 42.0% confidence.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was A Moments Madness > Hollywood Harmon, but actual result was Bellaney Lord (IRE) > Settle Down Jill (IRE). Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Actual winner not found in market analysis. Market dynamics shifted unexpectedly from pre-race state.
